topic: 듀라코트 퍼마코트 — car detailing garage, water beading hood, microfiber wipe
master_prompt: 실제 생활 현장에서 듀라코트 퍼마코트을(를) 사용하는 모습을 담은 실사 쇼츠 B-roll. 키워드: car detailing garage, water beading hood, microfiber wipe, driveway sunset. 스튜디오 연출·CG 금지.
flow_master_prompt_en: Photorealistic lifestyle short-form B-roll for 퍼마코트. Natural light, real hands and surfaces, keywords: car detailing garage, water beading hood, microfiber wipe, driveway sunset. No studio CGI, no logos only shots, South Korea urban car owner, apartment parking garage or coin self car wash booth, city sedan, no off-road mud, no mountain rally, no desert adventure
